headline: How Investors May Respond To Stryker (SYK) Cyber Disruption As Q1 2026 Earnings Expectations Build
summary: Stryker recently faced a cybersecurity disruption and is set to report its first-quarter 2026 results, with analysts watching MedSurg and Neurotechnology performance alongside expected 8% year-on-year revenue growth. Despite the disruption, analysts are emphasizing continued demand for procedures, robotics, and product innovation as they reassess how near-term costs and operational challenges could shape Stryker's earnings path. Next, we’ll examine how expectations for segment growth and...

headline: Stryker reports first quarter 2026 operating results
summary: Portage, Michigan, April 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Stryker (NYSE:SYK) reported operating results for the first quarter of 2026: First Quarter Results Reported net sales increased 2.6% to $6.0 billionOrganic net sales increased 2.4%Reported operating income margin of 15.5%Adjusted operating income margin(1) contracted 180 bps to 21.1%Reported EPS increased 14.2% to $1.93 Adjusted EPS(1) decreased 8.5% to $2.60 First Quarter Net Sales Growth Overview Reported Foreign Currency Exchange Constant

content.title: Stryker reports first quarter 2026 operating results
content.summary: Portage, Michigan, April 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Stryker (NYSE:SYK) reported operating results for the first quarter of 2026: First Quarter Results Reported net sales increased 2.6% to $6.0 billionOrganic net sales increased 2.4%Reported operating income margin of 15.5%Adjusted operating income margin(1) contracted 180 bps to 21.1%Reported EPS increased 14.2% to $1.93 Adjusted EPS(1) decreased 8.5% to $2.60 First Quarter Net Sales Growth Overview Reported Foreign Currency Exchange Constant
